description_long: This is a modern HP laptop with a sleek, metallic gray chassis and a slim profile. The front features a large display with thin bezels, running the Windows operating system, and a full-sized keyboard with a spacious touchpad below. The back of the lid displays the HP logo in a circular, metallic finish. Both sides of the laptop reveal a variety of ports, including USB and HDMI, as well as ventilation grilles for cooling. The hinge design allows the screen to open at a wide angle, and the overall build appears robust yet lightweight. The surface finish is smooth and slightly reflective, giving it a professional and contemporary appearance.
description: A slim, metallic gray HP laptop with a large display, full keyboard, and multiple side ports. The design is sleek, modern, and professional with a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open display with Windows OS, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, keyboard edge, and visible side ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the metallic lid with the HP logo and hinge mechanism.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim design, keyboard edge, and additional side ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular HP logo is visible on the center of the back lid, metallic in appearance with stylized lowercase 'hp' letters.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows desktop with application windows visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no numeric keypad, and standard laptop key arrangement.
